options.text: Text TCP — Actisense W2K-1 / PRO-NDC-1E2K (CAN ASCII mode), Yacht Devices YDEN-02
options.actisense_bst: Actisense BST — Actisense PRO-NDC-1E2K (CAN Actisense mode)

error.name_exists: This device name is already in use, please choose a different one.
error.pgn_not_valid: PGN list is invalid. Should be comma separated list of numbers.
error.include_exclude_only_one: One one of [Include PGN, Exclude PGN] can be specified.

user.description: Choose the gateway device name in Home Assistant.

options.description: Choose the gateway connection parameters and specify which PGNs to include or exclude. For best performance only use the PGNs that you wish to use. You can always update this later.

data.can_interface: CAN interface type (e.g. slcan, socketcan, seeedstudio)
data.exclude_AIS: Exclude all AIS PGNs (those keep generating new targets)
data.ms_between_updates: Number of milliseconds between updates (0=Update always)
